titleStmt.title: SII 23.428: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 428. (A.R. No. 428 of 1907.) Śiṉṉamaṉūr, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Rājasiṁhēśvara temple—on the south wall of the central shrine Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara I: year 3: 1270-71 A.D.

summary.p: The king is given the qualifying epithet ‘who took every country’. The details of the date Rishabha, śu. 4, Thursday, Punarvasu, gives the English equivalent A.D. 1270, pril 24. This registers the sale of a mā of land by the mahāsabhā of Arikēsarinallūr in Aḷa-nāḍu and two other bodies called the paṇṇaiśeyvār and vēli-śeyvār of the place to a certain Mahādēvaṉ Periyanāyaṉ alias Vaḻudinārāyaṇaṉ of Mālaṅguḍi in Śembi-nāḍu on behalf of the temple of Rāja siṁhēśvara for being made over to a dēvaraḍiyāḷ as jīvita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉacakravattikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulaicekaradevaṟku yāṇṭu 3vatu ṛṣabhanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu caturtthiyum viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa puṇarpūcattu nāḷ Aḷanāṭṭu brahmadeśam śrī Arikecarinallūr Uṭaiyār rājasiṅ heśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Āticaṇḍeśvaradevaṟku Ivvūr mahā sabhaiyum paṇṇaiceyvomum veliceyvomum
Ivvaṉaivomum caṇṭeśvara nilavilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricā vatu cempiṉāṭṭu mālaṅkuṭiyil mahādevaṉ periya nāyaṉāṉa vaḻuti nārāyaṇatevaṉ Ikkoyilil tevaraṭiyāḷ maṅkali makaḷ nalla tāyāṉa vaḻutinārāyaṇamāṇikkattukku caṇḍeśvarap peruvilaiyākak koṇṭu kāṇiyuñ civitamumākak koṇṭu kuṭutta nilamāvatu tevāra paṉmanallūr maṇi
yaṉ kovintaṉ kaṟpokkil viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam Oru māvukku Ellai yāvatu kiḻellai tirupputūr tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇaṉ cirāma bhaṭṭaṉ nilattukkum tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇacaṉmaṉ nilattukkum meṟkum teṉṉellai Aḻicaṟaipaṟṟukku vaṭakkum melellai meṟpaṭiyūṟ paṟṟukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai meṟpaṭiyūṟ paṟṟukkum sabhaipotu nilattukkum teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta
perunāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa Ivvūraḷaviṉpaṭi Eṟṟaccurukkamuṭpaṭa nilam pa Innilam Oru māvum Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷukku vilaikkuṟaviṟṟu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu viṟṟuvilai pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ādi caṇḍeśvaradevaṟkku mahāsabhaiyomum paṇṇaicceyvomum veli ceyvomum Ippaṭikku Ivai mocit tirumāliruñcolai nārā yaṇaṉ cirāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kavikeci niṉṟa nārāya
ṇaṉ Āṭkkoṇṭa piḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mokiliyaṉ tiru vellavāḻ nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai mokiliyaṉ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷanampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kāṭakkāṇi Aḻakiyaperu māḷ nampi Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Aruḷicceyya Eḻuttu veṭṭiṉeṉ cokkaṉ civalatevaṉāṉa Aḷanāṭṭācāriyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 23.428 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
